title: Delicious - Taste of Truth
description:
Join Emily, Patrick, and the kids on a journey through America's South, where each stop brings fast-paced cooking challenges, hidden truths, and revelations that could shatter their family forever!

Emily and Patrick are struggling to balance parenting, work, and Paige's growing interest in social media. But just as tensions rise, an unexpected letter arrives. Patrick's estranged father, Paddy, has invited the family to visit him in Florida. 

What starts as some fun in the sun soon takes an unsettling turn when a long-buried secret is revealed, sending the O'Malleys on an unexpected journey across America's South. With every stop, new clues emerge, old wounds are reopened, and the path ahead grows more uncertain. As they follow the trail left by the past, they must confront hard truths and find a path to forgiveness before their family is torn apart.

As you cook your way through six unique restaurants, you'll help Emily serve up delicious dishes, manage hungry customers, and upgrade each kitchen to create a fresh start at every stop. With exciting bonus levels, engaging mini-games, and oodles of upgrades, every challenge is a chance to test your Time Management skills, connect with familiar faces, and forge new bonds. 

While some answers bring closure, others lead to even more questions. What will the O'Malleys uncover on the road ahead, and are they truly ready for the truth?

Help Emily and her family uncover the past, face the truth, and find a path forward!

⏰ Fast-Paced Time Management: Cook, serve, and keep customers happy under pressure.

🎮 90 Levels of Delicious Fun: Play through 60 story levels and 30 challenge levels.

🗺️ A Culinary Road Trip: Travel through 6 unique restaurants, each with its own flavors and challenges.

🧩 Engaging Mini-Games: Take on interactive challenges that add extra layers of fun.

🍽️ Upgrades & Helpers: Improve your kitchen, choose your menu items, and hire helpers to keep things running smoothly.

🎨 Decorate & Personalize: Customize each restaurant to reflect your style.

📸 Capture Memories & Create Art: Unlock photos in Paige's photo journal and collect elements to design a stunning mural.

📖 A Compelling Story: Join Emily and Patrick as they navigate family, forgiveness, and unexpected surprises.

👫 Meet Familiar Faces & New Friends: Reconnect with beloved characters and meet new ones along the way.
description_short: The O'Malleys are back in a new adventure packed with food, family, and secrets!
